title: AN ACT CREATING A DIVISION AND ADDITIONAL POSITIONS IN THE GENERAL AUDITING OFFICE AND PROVIDING FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION THEREOF.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2475 / 55 OG No. 30, 5699 (July 27, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2253, June 18, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING A DIVISION AND ADDITIONAL POSITIONS IN THE GENERAL AUDITING OFFICE AND PROVIDING FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION THEREOF.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippinnes in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There is hereby created a Division under the Office of the Auditor General, General Auditing Office, to be known as the Control and Review Division, with the following positions and appropriation for its operation:

I. PERSONNEL SERVICES

One chief of division

P7200

One assistant chief of division

6,600

per annum

per annum

SEC. 2. The following additional positions are hereby created to augment the present force of the Program Unit f said Office:

Five auditors at P4,800

per annum

P 24,000

Five auditors at P3,960

per annum

\_\_19,800

Total

P43,800

=======

SEC. 3. There is hereby appropriated, out of any in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, the amount of seventy-five thousand two hundred pesos to carry out the provisions of the Act for the current fiscal year and the amount of one hundred sixty-seven thousand four hundred eighty pesos for the fiscal year nineteen hundred sixty. The corresponding appropriation for the succeeding fiscal years shall be included in the General Appropriation Acts for such years.

SEC. 4. Any savings realized in the appropriation authorized in this Act at the end of the fiscal year may be used by the Auditor General in strengthening his Office.

SEC. 5. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1959.
